Thus, 2 items (health_coverage and total_budget) are fully specified with all required details out of 5 total items.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes three main components: health_coverage ('Global Active Life' plan), property_coverage (broad business and natural disaster protection), and travel_coverage (global medical evacuation and adventure sports coverage). The name 'Global Active Life' does not appear in the ground-truth list, so we must match by description. The health coverage includes comprehensive specialist access, preventive care, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and wellness programs — this best aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (rating 9 for physical health, 9 for mental health), which emphasizes comprehensive coverage, low deductibles, telemedicine, and gym reimbursement. The property coverage description matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9), which covers electronics, equipment, and temporary accommodation. The travel coverage includes adventure sports, trip cancellation, and global emergency coverage, which aligns best with 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) from mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, as it specifically mentions adventure activities and business travel protection. The additional services (telemedicine, gym reimbursement, wellness programs, stress management) correspond to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8), 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' (rating 4), and 'Wellness Programs' (rating 3). Stress management is part of mental health coverage already considered under the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan'.
